nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and violent crimes. Operates worldwide with chapters in New York and elsewhere.
Motorcycle gang that was patched over by the Hells Angels in New York City in 1969.
Biker gang in Rochester that was patched over by the Hells Angels in 1969.
New York Mafia family that has links with the Hells Angels, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals.
New York Mafia family that has links with the Hells Angels, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals.
Western New York Mafia family that has links with the Hells Angels, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals.
Colombian drug cartel that partnered with the New York Hells Angels in smuggling cocaine.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club engaged in a long conflict with the Hells Angels, including violent incidents in New York.
Outlaws support club based in Fulton, New York, targeted by Hells Angels in a conflict.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in a conflict with Hells Angels in the Bronx, New York.
Motorcycle club that the Hells Angels were feuding with in Massachusetts in the 1970s.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in drug trafficking, weapons trafficking, and other crimes. Operates worldwide with chapters in New York and elsewhere.
Motorcycle gang that was patched over by Hells Angels in New York City in 1969.
Biker gang that was patched over by Hells Angels in Rochester in 1969.
Richmond, Virginia-based motorcycle club that introduced an informant to Hells Angels.
Nonprofit religious organization under which HAMC was incorporated in New York state.

edges.context: The Hells Angels founded their New York City chapter by patching over the Aliens motorcycle gang in 1969.
The Hells Angels founded their Rochester chapter by patching over the Hackers biker gang in 1969.
The Hells Angels formed links with the Gambino crime family, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals in exchange for drugs.
The Hells Angels formed links with the Genovese crime family, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals in exchange for drugs.
The Hells Angels formed links with the Bufalino crime family, providing security and transportation in narcotics deals in exchange for drugs.
The New York Hells Angels partnered with the Medellín Cartel in smuggling cocaine.
The Hells Angels and Outlaws have a decades-long conflict involving violent incidents, including a fatal brawl at Lancaster Speedway in 1994.
The Hells Angels targeted Kingsmen members due to the Kingsmen being an Outlaws support club, leading to a conspiracy to commit murder.
The Hells Angels and Pagans have a conflict, with a Pagans leader killed in the Bronx in 2020 in retaliation for an attack on Hells Angels.
The Hells Angels were feuding with Lucifer's Henchmen in Massachusetts in the 1970s.
Hells Angels patched over the Aliens motorcycle gang in New York City in 1969.
Hells Angels patched over the Hackers biker gang in Rochester in 1969.
Hells Angels provided security, transportation, and contract killings for the Gambino family in exchange for drugs.
Hells Angels provided security, transportation, and contract killings for the Genovese family in exchange for drugs.
Hells Angels provided security, transportation, and contract killings for the Bufalino family in exchange for drugs.
New York Hells Angels partnered with the Medellín Cartel in cocaine smuggling.
Confederate Angels president introduced an informant to Hells Angels San Francisco chapter president.
